original_question: There are 30 students in Marissa’s class. Each student started the year with 10 pencils. After two months, 1/5 of the total pencils in class were used. At the end of the year, only 1/3 of the remaining pencils were left. How many pencils were left? Let's think step by step and output the final answer after "####".
